ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Team 1 won by 10 runs) */,
  "man_of_the_match" TEXT /* Player of the match */,
  "toss_winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the toss winner (e.g., bat, field) */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Format of the match (e.g., T20, ODI, Test) */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, abandoned, postponed) */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, playoff, final) */,
  "umpire1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first on-field umpire */,
  "umpire2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second on-field umpire */,
  "third_umpire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third umpire */,
  "match_referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire1_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire1_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_third_umpire_id FOREIGN KEY ("third_umpire_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_toss_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("toss_winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire2_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire2_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_match_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_referee_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team coach */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Home ground of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the team */,
  "team_sponsor" TEXT /* Primary sponsor of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style (e.g., right-handed, left-handed) */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style (e.g., right-arm fast, left-arm spin) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's image */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the player */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the player */,
  "total_matches_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the player */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player */,
  "total_wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken by the player */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest individual score by the player */,
  "best_bowling" TEXT /* Best bowling performance (e.g., 5/40) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "innings" (
  "inning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each innings */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team batting in this innings */,
  "inning_number" INTEGER /* Inning number (1st or 2nd) */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored in the innings */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken in the innings */,
  "overs" REAL /* Total overs bowled in the innings */,
  "inning_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the innings */,
  "inning_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the innings */,
  "inning_status" TEXT /* Status of the innings (e.g., completed, in progress, interrupted) */,
  "inning_type" TEXT /* Type of innings (e.g., first, second, third, fourth) */,
  "inning_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the innings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_innings_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_innings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "balls" (
  "ball_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ball */,
  "inning_id" INTEGER /* ID of the innings */,
  "over" INTEGER /* Over number */,
  "ball_number" INTEGER /* Ball number within the over */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team batting */,
  "striker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the striker */,
  "non_striker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the non-striker */,
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowler */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Runs scored off the ball */,
  "extras" INTEGER /* Extras (if any) */,
  "wicket" TEXT /* Wicket (if any) */,
  "out_batsman_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batsman who got out (if any) */,
  "ball_type" TEXT /* Type of ball (e.g., legal, wide, no ball) */,
  "ball_speed" REAL /* Speed of the ball in km/h */,
  "ball_length" TEXT /* Length of the ball (e.g., full, good, short) */,
  "ball_line" TEXT /* Line of the ball (e.g., straight, off, leg) */,
  "ball_result" TEXT /* Result of the ball (e.g., boundary, wicket, dot ball) */,
  "ball_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ball (e.g., 'Watson drives the ball through mid-off for a boundary') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ball_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balls_non_striker_id FOREIGN KEY ("non_striker_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balls_out_batsman_id FOREIGN KEY ("out_batsman_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balls_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balls_inning_id FOREIGN KEY ("inning_id") REFERENCES innings ("inning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balls_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowler_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balls_striker_id FOREIGN KEY ("striker_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "inning_id" INTEGER /* ID of the innings */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the player */,
  "balls_faced" INTEGER /* Balls faced by the player */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours scored */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes scored */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Wickets taken by the player */,
  "overs_bowled" REAL /* Overs bowled by the player */,
  "maidens" INTEGER /* Maiden overs bowled by the player */,
  "runs_conceded" INTEGER /* Runs conceded by the player */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of the player */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player */,
  "average" REAL /* Average runs scored per match */,
  "player_form" TEXT /* Current form of the player (e.g., good, average, poor) */,
  "player_rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the player */,
  "player_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the player's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_inning_id FOREIGN KEY ("inning_id") REFERENCES innings ("inning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpires" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Name of the umpire */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the umpire */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the umpire */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the umpire */,
  "umpire_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the umpire's image */,
  "umpire_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the umpire */,
  "total_matches_umpired" INTEGER /* Total number of matches umpired */,
  "umpire_rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the umpire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_umpires" (
  "match_umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match-umpire assignment */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the umpire */,
  "umpire_role" TEXT /* Role of the umpire (e.g., on-field, third umpire) */,
  "umpire_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the umpire's performance in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_umpires_umpire_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_umpires_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the venue is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of venue (e.g., international, domestic) */,
  "venue_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the venue */,
  "venue_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the venue's image */,
  "venue_facts" TEXT /* Interesting facts about the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_venues" (
  "match_venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match-venue assignment */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue */,
  "venue_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the venue for the specific match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_venues_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_venues_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., match official, analyst, admin) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "user_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's image */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the match data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the match data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
